words.def: the day on which you receive pay for your work
words.zh: n. 發薪日, 發工資日, 交割日, 過戶結帳日

words.def: a number of sheets of paper fastened together along one edge
words.zh: n. 填補, 襯墊, 印色盒, 路

words.def: a branch of the Tai languages

words.zh: n. 薪資, 付款, 補償

words.def: time for Earth to make a complete rotation on its axis
words.zh: n. 天, 日子, 白天, 工作日
